project_name: HRE Exporter CRM Admin Dashboard - Phase 1

theme.description: Clean industrial B2B dashboard, bold typography, sharp geometric feel, catalogue style, white background with dark sidebar and yellow highlights. Precision engineering feel.

buttons.primary: bg-[#FBAE17] text-black hover:bg-[#E59D12] rounded-none font-bold px-6 py-2 transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-zinc-300 text-zinc-900 hover:bg-zinc-100 rounded-none px-6 py-2 transition-colors
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-zinc-600 hover:text-black hover:bg-zinc-100 rounded-none px-4 py-2 transition-colors

inputs.style: border border-zinc-300 rounded-none px-3 py-2 bg-white focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#FBAE17] focus:border-transparent transition-all
inputs.label: text-xs font-bold text-zinc-700 uppercase tracking-wider mb-1 block

tables.header: bg-zinc-100 text-zinc-700 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider border-b-2 border-zinc-300 py-3 px-4

sidebar.container: bg-[#1A1A1A] text-white flex flex-col h-screen fixed w-64 border-r border-zinc-800
sidebar.nav_item: flex items-center px-6 py-3 text-sm font-medium transition-colors cursor-pointer

cards.stat_card: p-6 border border-zinc-200 bg-white flex flex-col justify-between

images.description: Industrial factory floor with heavy machinery for login page background
Copper wires, texture, can be used as generic placeholder for products

icons.instructions: Use Phosphor Icons for their clean, industrial geometric look that matches the B2B tech aesthetic.

motion.hover_effects: opacity change or subtle background change. Avoid bouncy or dramatic transforms.
motion.page_load: fade in, subtle slide up for lists

testing.attributes: All interactive elements (buttons, nav links, table rows, form inputs) MUST include data-testid attributes formatted as kebab-case-role.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required fonts from Google Fonts: 'Chivo' and 'Inter'.
Configure tailwind.config.js with provided colors (#1A1A1A, #FBAE17, etc.) and fonts.
Do NOT use soft rounded corners (`rounded-lg`, `rounded-xl`). Stick to `rounded-none` or max `rounded-sm` for a sharp industrial feel.
The Sidebar must be dark (#1A1A1A) with white logo text 'HRE EXPORTER'. Active state should use the yellow highlight #FBAE17.
Data tables must look like technical catalogues: dense, clear borders, left-aligned text, monospaced fonts for technical dimensions if applicable.
Implement JWT Auth context and wrap the application.
Mock API responses for Dashboard Stats, Product Families, Variants, Categories, and Materials.
Use Shadcn UI components but override their default rounded corners to `rounded-none`.
Build the nested tree structure for Categories management using a recursive component or collapsible Shadcn Accordion/List.
For product variants, support dynamic JSON columns for dimension specifications.
